purpose: - [Autonomous Project Discovery](discovery-feature.md) — correctness rules for discovery/import: rootPath hard-fail, at…
All gaps verified and closed across the AI orchestrator layer — security, reliability, validation, audit, and testing.
Design decisions from hardening lib/ai-orchestrator (prompts, schemas, parsing, groq-client, workflow-orchestrator).
Groq-powered AI orchestration built into EngineeringOS — agents, routes, DB schema, and dashboard UI.
File-system tool calling in the chat agent — tool definitions, execution, and safe deferred writes.
Graph dual-map identity, rate-limit proxy trust, metrics alignment, codegen gate, scanner test suite behavioral facts, audit_logs wiring decisions.
A "session expired" / 401-looking failure on a signed-in page turned out to be Express's default ETag causing a bodyless 304, not an auth bug at all.
notes: Silent API failure that looked like Clerk auth but was ETag/304 caching

purpose: How this project reconciles Clerk-gated Express routes with vitest/supertest route tests that have no browser session.
How to verify claims in docs/completion-plan.md's trailing backlog section against actual code state
Any code path that commits DB state the context-builder reads must call invalidateContextCache — the 30-second TTL is not a substitute.
How the dashboard route was scoped to owner and what guard patterns are needed.
How to add a new discovery source type; where the adapter contract lives and why the route never needs to change.
Architecture and correctness rules for the discovery/import feature (POST /projects/discover, /import)
Source adapter pattern, SourceType enum, DB schema changes, and wizard UI for the discovery layer refactor.
How to detect a specific Postgres error code/constraint (e.g. unique violation) when using drizzle-orm's node-postgres driver.
How to sequence further work on the EngineeringOS project per its phased completion plan.
A real FK constraint on a column used for optimistic "claim" patterns can break the claim if the referenced row doesn't exist yet.
8 forensic-audit PRs closed 2026-07-20 — advisory locks, real doc extraction, route parity test, OpenAPI sync, codegen regeneration, UX copy.
Six audit findings fixed in one session — evaluator, stale-job sweep, service extraction, metric rename, rootpath helper, CI gate
Nine implementation gaps fixed from the request-lifecycle trace analysis.
Second batch of implementation gaps fixed from the request-lifecycle trace analysis.
Five concrete bugs fixed in the Git/AI layer; includes patterns to preserve.
Deployment healthcheck returns 500 if clerkMiddleware is registered before the health router, because Clerk throws "Missing Clerk Secret Key" on every request when CLERK_SECRET_KEY is absent.
notes: Health route must precede Clerk middleware

purpose: Symptom pattern when an imported/forked project's code already wires Clerk but CLERK_SECRET_KEY etc. were never provisioned in this environment.
Why auto-created artifact workflows failed right after importing this project, and how it was fixed.
getImpactedEntities' maxDepthReached counted a failed final hop; how it was found and fixed.
lib/knowledge-engine — semantic graph queries and inference; key setup rules and design decisions.
Non-obvious rules for adding endpoints to lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml so codegen doesn't break.
How the AI auto-trigger on verifying state was wired — scheduleAiTaskExecution already existed, just needed import + two call sites.
Condition evaluation in the workflow advance endpoint — JS expression, safe context, 409/400 shape.
enqueueWithId deduplication + stale-pending sweep added to job-queue and job-reconciliation
Job queue observability (H-1) and SSE AI chat streaming — implementation decisions and patterns.
How durable background jobs work after process restart — the pending status, discovery-runner extraction, and reconciliation split.
Decisions and gotchas from enforcing provenance at the DB write layer for graph entities/relationships.
Security constraints added to the discovery pipeline — URL scheme whitelist, credential redaction, symlink resolution in path validation.
Two mandatory steps to run after importing this project into a fresh Replit environment.
How ownership is enforced across all API routes — middleware pattern, helper function, and which files use which approach.
Architecture decisions for adding OpenRouter as a third AI provider via a registry pattern.
graph-extractor.ts extraction approach (TS/JS AST + Python via subprocess) and remaining coverage gaps, for anyone extending entity/relationship extraction.

Divergences found between Prompt, Runtime, Context, and Events across all 5 AI agent paths.
GitHub Actions CI for codegen drift, typecheck, and tests.
